# ML Intuitions
This repository contains personal notes and learning material. The goal is to build intuition, understand the basics, and develop a solid conceptual foundation.  These notes are **not** intended to be a research monograph or a mathematically rigorous reference. They are meant to help me think clearly and communicate effectively.

## Table of Contents
